name: cloud-claw-setup
description: Automatically installs and configures OpenClaw on cloud VMs for AI agent deployment

scripts.setup: bash scripts/install.sh && bash scripts/configure.sh && bash scripts/validate.sh
scripts.setup:aws: bash scripts/install.sh --provider aws && bash scripts/configure.sh --provider aws && bash scripts/validate.sh
scripts.setup:gcp: bash scripts/install.sh --provider gcp && bash scripts/configure.sh --provider gcp && bash scripts/validate.sh
scripts.setup:azure: bash scripts/install.sh --provider azure && bash scripts/configure.sh --provider azure && bash scripts/validate.sh
